name_cn:
❤️Chanel 21 Fall/Winter 19bag Latest Panda so black
Gun buckle
This bag is simply a combination of all Chanel classic elements: Chanel quilted pattern, chain bag, double C logo, love at first sight!💘When I first saw it, always miss him❤️Can be handheld, crossbody, side bag, shoulder bag, or handbag. It's simply a perfect versatile bag!😄Feels soft and comfortable, love it~30cm
